visual_description: In a dim stone corridor with tall arches, a person in dark clothing runs from the far end toward the camera. As they move, a wall collapses, sending debris and dust into the air. The dust obscures the view as the figure continues forward.
audio_description: Echoing footsteps are heard as the person runs. A loud crash and settling dust follow.
